---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the kit is broken, inconsistent, or doesn't work as documented
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Affected asset(s)**
Which folder/file? (e.g. `observability/recording_rules.yml`,
`ci-cd/github-actions/publish.yml`)

**What's wrong**
What did you expect, and what actually happened? If this only reproduces
after copying the asset into your own repo, note what (if anything) you
changed from the original.

**Steps to reproduce**

**Kit version / commit**
